productDisplayName: Carrera Men Dial Green Numbers Black Watch
description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as  masters in the art of  creating high quality timepieces.  The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and perfect for urban wear.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: OctagonStainless steel caseSteel strap with black patching that has brand inscription on the inner side for enhanced durability, comfort and styleTang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and styleBlack busy dial with metallic numbers in Roman and metallic handsInbuilt tachymeter to measure speed/distanceChronograph for easy reading of timeMetallic crown to adjust time/date/dayWater resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for scuba diving
